questions: thesis ar dissertation er difference ki?
answers: A thesis is a long research document written as part of a master's degree. It presents original research, demonstrates expertise in a field, and is typically supervised by a faculty advisor.
Thesis likhte hole first ekta specific research question nao, advisor er sathe discuss koro, proposal likho, research conduct koro, then systematically likhe complete koro. Planning onek important.

A thesis typically includes introduction, literature review, methodology, findings, analysis, conclusion, and bibliography. It requires months of dedicated research and writing, usually 50-100+ pages.
Thesis defense holo tomar research committee er samne tomar work present kora ar questions er answer dewa. Preparation, practice, ar confidence key. Most students pass with revisions.
